title: Creamy Ethiopian Flour Tibs
description: A floral, creamy Ethiopian tibs with a strong white bread flour base, served from a bamboo tray for a nostalgic feel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and lightly oil a bamboo tray.
Whisk 40 g of white bread flour with 200 ml of coconut milk until smooth.
Stir in 15 ml olive oil, 3 minced garlic cloves, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tsp cinnamon, 10 g chopped parsley, and 10 g chopped cilantro.
Pour the batter into the prepared bamboo tray, spreading it evenly.
Bake for 20 minutes until the top is golden brown.
Remove the tray from the oven, let it cool for 5 minutes, then sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Dollop 30 g of Greek yogurt on top and drizzle a little extra olive oil.
Slice the tibs into bite‑sized pieces and serve warm.
Garnish with fresh herbs and a squeeze of lemon if desired.
Enjoy the creamy, floral flavors of this nostalgic Ethiopian dish!
